summary: Iteration 139: AdminSettingsPage refactoring and forum enhancements verification complete. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend verified - all extracted tab components load correctly, forum features working.

ui_bugs.issue: Called rewardsAPI.getSyncStatus() which doesn't exist - should be adminGetSyncStatus()

issues: Toggle voters button only visible when votes exist (correct behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: AdminSettingsPage successfully refactored from 3368 to ~1900 lines
EmailsTab, TradingTab, DiagnosticsTab extracted correctly and load their own data independently
Forum voting system works: upvote, downvote, toggle (same vote removes), switch votes
Cannot vote on own comment (400 error) correctly enforced
Similar posts AJAX search works with 400ms debounce
Top contributors shows reputation score correctly
seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminSettingsPage refactoring verified. All extracted tabs (EmailsTab, TradingTab, DiagnosticsTab) load correctly. Forum enhancements work: voting, similar search, reputation in top contributors. Existing posts: 'TEST_ForumPost da113ce8' (open), 'How to calculate lot size?' (closed with Best Answer). Fixed DiagnosticsTab API call bug.

admin_settings_seo_tab.details: SEO & Meta Settings loads with site title, description, OG image inputs

admin_settings_branding_tab.details: Branding tab loads with Platform Name, Tagline, Logo, Favicon, PWA Icon inputs

admin_settings_emails_tab_extracted.details: EmailsTab component loads independently with Email Templates list and Email History section

admin_settings_trading_tab_extracted.details: TradingTab component loads independently with Trading Products and Global Market Holidays

admin_settings_diagnostics_tab_extracted.details: DiagnosticsTab loads with: Batch Sync All, Run Health Check, Licensee Diagnostic, Rewards Platform Sync, Scan All Members buttons

admin_settings_maintenance_tab.details: Maintenance Mode toggle and message input visible

forum_list_page_stats.details: Stats bar shows Total Posts, Open, Solved, Comments counts

forum_top_contributors_reputation.details: Top Contributors section shows: rank, name, best answers, upvotes received, comments count, reputation score

forum_new_post_similar_search.details: New Post dialog triggers similar posts AJAX search when typing 3+ chars in title with 400ms debounce

forum_post_voting_buttons.details: Upvote/downvote buttons visible on comments. Toggle voters appears when votes exist

forum_cannot_vote_own_comment.details: Backend returns 400 'Cannot vote on your own comment' - Vote buttons disabled for own comments

forum_sidebar_link.details: Community Forum link visible in sidebar with data-testid='nav-forum'

backend_vote_api.details: POST /api/forum/comments/{id}/vote - creates, toggles, switches votes correctly

backend_stats_reputation_api.details: GET /api/forum/stats returns top_contributors with reputation scores

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/forum/stats - 200 OK, includes top_contributors with reputation

data-testid='health-check-btn' - Health Check button in Diagnostics
